info.name: Healthcare Platform - Prescription API
info.description: Complete Postman collection for Prescription Management. Doctors can create and manage prescriptions with medicines, diagnosis, and follow-up dates. Patients can view their prescription history.

item.name: Doctor - Prescription Management

request.description:
**Doctor Only - Create Prescription**

Create a new prescription after completing a consultation. This endpoint:
- Validates booking is completed and belongs to the doctor
- Creates prescription with diagnosis, medicines, and advice
- Sends notification to patient
- Updates booking with prescription reference
- Prevents duplicate prescriptions for same booking

**Required Fields:**
- bookingId: Completed booking ID
- diagnosis: Medical diagnosis

**Optional Fields:**
- medicines: Array of medicine objects
  - name: Medicine name with strength
  - dosage: Dosage amount
  - frequency: How often to take
  - duration: Treatment duration
  - instructions: Special instructions
- advice: General health advice
- followUpDate: Next consultation date
- prescriptionFile: S3 URL of uploaded prescription PDF
- notes: Doctor's private notes

**Medicine Examples:**
- Paracetamol 500mg - 3 times daily - 5 days
- Amoxicillin 500mg - 3 times daily - 7 days
- Cetirizine 10mg - Once daily - 7 days
- Omeprazole 20mg - Once daily before breakfast - 14 days
Example prescription for diabetes management with multiple medications and lifestyle advice.
Get all prescriptions created by the doctor with pagination. Returns patient details, booking info, and prescription data.
Update an existing prescription. Doctor can modify diagnosis, medicines, advice, or notes. Only the doctor who created the prescription can update it.

item.description: Doctor endpoints for creating and managing prescriptions

item.name: Patient - View Prescriptions

request.description: Get all prescriptions for the patient with pagination. Returns doctor details, booking info, diagnosis, medicines, and advice.
Get a specific prescription by ID. Patient can only view their own prescriptions.

item.description: Patient endpoints for viewing prescription history

item.name: Common - Get Prescription

request.description: Doctor can view prescription details including patient info, medicines, and notes.

item.description: Common endpoint accessible by both doctor and patient

item.name: Prescription Examples

request.description: Example prescription for gastritis and acid reflux treatment.
Example prescription for asthma management with inhalers.
Example prescription for urinary tract infection treatment.

item.description: Real-world prescription examples for common conditions
